member.name: T:MaplibreNative.GeoJSON
member.summary: Wraps a parsed GeoJSON value (geometry, feature, or feature collection). Instances are returned by and used when passing geometry data to map sources.

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.BackendScope.ScopeType
member.summary: There are two types of scopes: Creating an "Implicit" scope tells Mapbox GL that the supporting windowing system has already activated the GL Backend and that no further actions are required. Creating an "Explicit" scope actually enables the GL Backend, and disables it when the BackendScope is destroyed.

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.HeadlessFrontend
member.summary: Common headless backend interface, provides HeadlessBackend backend factory and enables extending gfx::Renderable with platform specific implementation of .

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.OverscaledTileID
member.summary: Has integer z/x/y coordinates overscaledZ describes the zoom level this tile is intented to represent, e.g. when parsing data z is never larger than the source's maxzoom z/x/y describe

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.Resource.TileData
member.summary: Includes auxiliary data if this is a tile request.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.ShaderRegistry.RegisterShaderGroup(MaplibreNative.ShaderGroup,System.String)
member.summary: Register a new shader group with the registry for the given name. If a shader group is present in the registry with a conflicting name, registration will fail.
member.param: Unique name to register the shader group under.
member.returns: True if the shader group was registered, false if another shader group is already present with a conflicting name.

member.summary: Replace a matching shader group in the registry with the provided name.
member.param: Unique name to register the shader group under.
member.returns: True if a match was found and the shader group was replaced, false otherwise.

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.ShaderRegistry

member.summary: Returns shared instance of a file source for (type, options) tuple. Creates new instance via registered factory if needed. If new instance cannot be created, nullptr would be returned.

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.FileSourceManager
member.summary:
A singleton class responsible for managing file sources.
The FileSourceManager provides following functionality:
- provides access to file sources of a specific type and configuration - caches previously created file sources of a (type, configuration) tuples

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.SetResourceTransform(MaplibreNative.ResourceTransform)
member.summary: When supported, sets the modifier of the requested resources.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.GetProperty(System.String)
member.summary: Generic getter method

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.SetProperty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generic setter method

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.Resume
member.summary:
Resume file request activity.
Calling resume will unpause the file source and process any tasks that expired while the file source was paused.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.Pause
member.summary:
Pause file request activity.
If pause is called then no revalidation or network request activity will occur.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.CanRequest(MaplibreNative.Resource)
member.summary: Checks whether a resource could be requested from this file source.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.SupportsCacheOnlyRequests
member.summary: When a file source supports consulting a local cache only, it must return true. Cache-only requests are requests that aren't as urgent, but could be useful, e.g. to cover part of the map while loading. The FileSource should only do cheap actions to retrieve the data, e.g. load it from a cache, but not from the internet.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.Forward(MaplibreNative.Resource,MaplibreNative.Response,System.Action)
member.summary: Allows to forward response from one source to another. Optionally, callback can be provided to receive notification for forward operation.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FileSource.Request(MaplibreNative.Resource,MaplibreNative.FileSource.Callback)
member.summary: Request a resource. The callback will be called asynchronously, in the same thread as the request was made. This thread must have an active RunLoop. The request may be cancelled before completion by releasing the returned AsyncRequest. If the request is cancelled before the callback is executed, the callback will not be executed.

member.name: T:MaplibreNative.IRendererFrontend
member.summary:
The RenderFrontend is the bridge between the Map and platform used to update and observer the Renderer
It hides any threading specifics and always replies on the original thread.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.MapOptions.WithConstrainMode(<unknown type>)
member.summary: Sets the map constrain mode. This can be used to limit the map to wrap around the globe horizontally. By default, it is set to HeightOnly.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.MapOptions.WithMapMode(<unknown type>)
member.summary: Sets the map rendering mode. By default, it is set to Continuous so the map will render as data arrives from the network and react immediately to state changes.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.Map.FreeCameraOptions
member.summary: FreeCameraOptions provides more direct access to the underlying camera entity. For backwards compatibility the state set using this API must be representable with `CameraOptions` as well. Parameters are clamped to a valid range or discarded as invalid if the conversion to the pitch and bearing presentation is ambiguous. For example orientation can be invalid if it leads to the camera being upside down or the quaternion has zero length.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.Map.TileLodMinRadius
member.summary: The number of map tile requests can be reduced by using a lower level of details away from the camera. This can improve performance, particularly when the camera pitch is high. See the maplibre-native documentation for details on the LOD heuristic parameters.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.Map.PrefetchZoomDelta
member.summary: When loading a map, if is set to any number greater than 0, the map will first request a tile for `zoom - delta` in a attempt to display a full map at lower resolution as quick as possible. It will get clamped at the tile source minimum zoom. The default `delta` is 4.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.Map.Bounds
member.summary: Returns the current map bound options. All optional fields in BoundOptions are set.

member.summary: Default tile LOD algorithm (center-of-screen based).

member.name: F:<unknown type>.Screen
member.summary: Constrain the map so that the screen bounds match the lat/lng bounds set via BoundOptions.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.Location
member.summary: Sets the mercator position as Lat&Lng and altitude in meters. Fails to return a value if is invalid or is not set.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.Orientation
member.summary:
Orientation of the camera represented as a unit quaternion [x, y, z, w]. The default pose of the camera is such that the forward vector is looking up the -Z axis and the up vector is aligned with north orientation of the map: forward [0, 0, -1], up [0, -1, 0], right [1, 0, 0]
Orientation can be set freely but certain constraints still apply - Pitch has an upper limit

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.Position
member.summary: Position of the camera in slightly modified web mercator coordinates - The size of 1 unit is the width of the projected world instead of the "mercator meter". Coordinate [0, 0, 0] is the north-west corner and [1, 1, 0] is the south-east corner. - Z coordinate is conformal and must respect minimum and maximum zoom values. - Zoom is automatically computed from the altitude (z)

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.SetRollPitchBearing(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Helper function for setting the orientation of the camera as a roll, pitch and a bearing. All values are in degrees.

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.LookAtPoint(MaplibreNative.LatLng,MaplibreNative.Vec3)
member.summary: Helper function for setting orientation of the camera by defining a focus point on the map. Up vector is required in certain scenarios where bearing can't be deduced from the viewing direction

member.name: M:MaplibreNative.FreeCameraOptions.LookAtPoint(MaplibreNative.LatLng)
member.summary: Helper function for setting orientation of the camera by defining a focus point on the map. Up vector is required in certain scenarios where bearing can't be deduced from the viewing direction

member.summary: Various options for accessing physical properties of the underlying camera entity. A direct access to these properties allows more flexible and precise controlling of the camera while also being fully compatible and interchangeable with CameraOptions. All properties are optional.

member.name: P:MaplibreNative.AnimationOptions.Velocity
member.summary:
Average velocity of a flyTo() transition, measured in screenfuls per second, assuming a linear timing curve.
A screenful is the visible span in pixels. It does not correspond to a fixed physical distance but rather varies by zoom level.
